evidence: verify CGO_ENABLED=0 go build/vet/test at HEAD; go.mod declares go 1.22; internal/config/imports_test.go TestDisallowedImportIsCaught bans cgo import C. Weakness: no running assertion on the 1.22-or-newer clause itself.

AUDIT F5: no test would catch a future violation, and one already exists - cmd/aido/config_show_test.go:37,42,46 rebuild .aido/ paths by filepath.Join instead of the Root constructors. imports_test.go scans only internal/config.
internal/config/paths_test.go TestConstructorsCreateNothing and config_test.go TestLoadCreatesNothing: every constructor against an empty temp dir leaves it empty.
internal/config/config_test.go TestLoadPopulatesAndIgnoresUnknown: declared keys land in the returned Config.
internal/config/config_test.go TestLoadMissingIsNotExist: errors.Is(err, fs.ErrNotExist) and nil config, no default substituted.
internal/config/config_test.go TestLoadMalformedNamesFileAndPosition: error names the config path and a line position.
internal/config/config_test.go TestLoadEmptyFile and TestLoadPopulatesAndIgnoresUnknown: omitted optional keys stay zero, unknown top-level key is ignored.
internal/config/validate_test.go TestValidateSingleFailures (missing project, missing tracked_branch) and TestValidateBothRequiredKeysMissing.
internal/config/validate_test.go TestValidateSingleFailures/default_provider_not_in_providers: problem names the unknown provider.
internal/config/validate_test.go TestValidateSingleFailures/unsupported_provider and TestValidateAcceptsEverySupportedProvider over the closed set.
internal/config/validate_test.go TestValidateSingleFailures/required_docs_outside_okf: problem names the offending entry.
internal/config/validate_test.go TestValidateReportsEveryFailureAtOnce: three unrelated violations all present in one aggregate error.
internal/config/secrets_test.go TestResolveKeyEnvWins: env value returned in preference to the .secrets.yaml value.
internal/config/secrets_test.go TestResolveKeyEmptyEnvFallsThroughToFile and TestResolveKeyNvidiaKeyName.

AUDIT F4: the main path (secrets file parses, provider key absent) at secrets.go:78 is never executed by any test - the tests that appear to cover it exit at secrets.go:65 and :45 instead. TestResolveKeyNeverLeaksKeyIntoErrors asserts nothing when err is nil (secrets_test.go:152).
internal/config/secrets_test.go TestResolveKeyNoneSource: api_key_source none yields empty key and nil error.

internal/config/secrets_test.go TestResolveKeyMalformedSecretsQuotesNothing and TestResolveKeyNeverLeaksKeyIntoErrors; cmd/aido/config_show_test.go TestConfigShowPrintsKeySourceNotKey. Auditor read every error-construction site and found no key-carrying path.

AUDIT F1 (BLOCKER): implemented via exec of the git binary (secrets.go:107), which steering tech.md T3 refuses outright: 'a runtime that requires the git binary on PATH is refused'. go-git is on the T1 allowlist and was not used, no ADR. Also secrets_test.go:162 skips all three R4.6 tests when git is absent, so the coverage is silently vanishable, and design.md specifies R4.6 nowhere.

internal/config/write_test.go TestWriteFileCreates, TestWriteFileOverwrites, TestWriteFileTempStaysInDestinationDirectory (TMPDIR untouched). Weakness recorded by AUDIT F10: TestWriteFileOverwrites would also pass against a plain os.WriteFile, so the temp-then-rename mechanism itself is under-asserted.
internal/config/write_test.go TestWriteFileFailureLeavesDestinationIntact: destination bytes identical after a failed write.

AUDIT F3: the pre-rename cleanup is dead under test. Coverage shows write.go:31-48 (the whole abort closure) at zero - TestWriteFileFailureLeavesDestinationIntact fails at os.CreateTemp (write.go:25) and returns before abort exists, so its 'no temp file left' assertion is vacuous. Deleting the os.Remove in abort leaves the suite green.
internal/config/write_test.go TestWriteFileHonoursMode and secrets_test.go TestWriteSecretsWritesWhenIgnored: 0600 on create.
cmd/aido/config_show_test.go TestConfigShowValid and TestConfigShowBinaryIntegration (real built binary, real .aido/ tree): non-secret values printed, exit zero.
cmd/aido/config_show_test.go TestConfigShowMissingConfigExitsZero and TestConfigShowInvalidConfigReportsEveryProblem; the integration test repeats the missing-config path against the built binary.

cmd/aido/config_show_test.go TestConfigShowPrintsKeySourceNotKey: api_key_source printed verbatim, key literal absent from stdout and stderr. Weakness recorded by AUDIT F10: configShow never calls ResolveKey, so the test cannot regress.
